Package neqsim.process.equipment.powergeneration.gasturbine

Class TurbineDispatchOptimizer.DispatchResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.powergeneration.gasturbine.TurbineDispatchOptimizer.DispatchResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
TurbineDispatchOptimizer
public static class TurbineDispatchOptimizer.DispatchResult extends Object implements Serializable
Dispatch result container.
